prompt: A haunting, hyper-realistic conceptual photograph. A vast, dark expanse of a night sky, but instead of stars, there are thousands of delicate, glowing, intricately crafted glass lanterns floating. A massive, oppressive shadow is sweeping across the frame from the right, and as it touches the lanterns, they instantly shatter and turn to cold, gray ash, dissolving into nothingness. The left side has a few clustered, frantically flickering lanterns, while the right side is an immense, devastating void of empty space. The composition makes the viewer feel the irreversible loss of diverse, fragile lights. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, no text, no charts.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Humanity's linguistic diversity is rapidly being extinguished, leaving a terrifying void where vibrant, unique worldviews once existed.
